name: BRNROT.FUN 🧠
tagline: building stupid shit that actually helps (sometimes)
description: home of the chronically online trying to heal. a collection of weird little tools nobody asked for 💀
creatorNote: Made this because I kept building stuff and needed somewhere to put it. chaos ensued. no regrets ✨

name: Touch Grass
tagline: Your daily side quest. No excuses.
description: A daily challenge app that breaks you out of your NPC routine by assigning one random quest per day.
creatorNote: Built this because I kept saying I'd do something different and never did.

name: algorizz
description: Algorithm visualizer with chaotic step-by-step commentary. learn without wanting to quit.
creatorNote: Cooking up a way to make DSA actually stick. no more dry textbook energy.

name: pixeldump
tagline: pixel art for people with too much time.
description: Simple pixel art editor with brainrot colour palettes and chaotic brushes.
creatorNote: Wanted a pixel art tool that didn't take itself seriously.

name: werk
tagline: a todo list for people who hate todo lists.
description: Chaotic task manager with anxiety meters and avoidance tracking. get stuff done or don't.
creatorNote: Because traditional productivity tools give NPC energy.

name: git rekt
description: CLI tool that gives brainrot feedback on your code. no cap, only roasts.
creatorNote: GitHub Copilot but make it roast you instead of helping you.

name: pepperd
tagline: research papers but make them readable.
description: Visualization tool for academic papers with brainrot summaries and interactive diagrams.
creatorNote: Making academia accessible to people who refuse to read 40-page PDFs.
